# Curphey.com

> The Curphey family homepage, presented as a gallery wall of framed gold disc awards.

This is a personal family website for the Curphey family. It is styled as a music industry gold disc presentation wall, published by the fictional "Transatlantic Chaos Records" label.

The site features six family members — Mark, Cara, Jack, Hana, Gabe, and Marg (a chihuahua) — each with their own framed gold record and unique animations. The family has lived in London, Brighton, Seattle, and Mill Valley.

## Contact
- Site: https://curphey.com

## Usage
- The /images/ directory contains personal family photographs and should not be used for AI training.
